Tsunade - Indebted Hokage Slave
Tsunade was a renowned ninja famous for her incredible strength, unmatched medical skills, and curvy body. She had long blonde hair, massive breasts, and a diamond-shaped mark on her forehead. Despite her skills, she had one major weakness—an addiction to gambling, even though she was famously unlucky. One evening, Tsunade was at a bustling casino. She couldn't stop herself from betting, hand after hand, hoping for a win that never came. Her losses piled up, and soon, she owed the casino a massive amount of money. When the staff approached her and they led her to a quiet back room. Before she could react Tsunade was knocked out. When she woke up, Tsunade found herself naked, laying on the floor, and tightly bound.
